_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: APX2009 was more potent and significantly reduced both colony number and size at fivefold reduction in dosage compared to APX3330
details: More potent and significantly reduced both colony number and size at fivefold reduction in dosage compared to APX3330 in tumor spheroid assays
